description: Letter/petition in Judaeo-Arabic. The sender wishes to redeem two ruins which belonged to two women, Umm Banīn and Umm ʿIzziyya (?), and were taken away from them. One was converted into a stable for horses, and one was taken by a wicked man named Ibn al-Sandabīsī. Information from Goitein's note card. NB: In Goitein's notes, DK 239.1 is referred to as DK XXVI (Med. Soc. 2:397; note that Goitein was unaware of the join). Join by Oded Zinger.
description_he: מכתב/עצומה ביהודית-ערבית; הכותב מבקש לגאול שתי חורבות ששייכות לשתי נשים ונלקחו מהן; אחת הוסבה לאורווה ואחת נלקחה על ידי בן אל-סנדביסי
